products.name: C5ISRT
products.descriptor: Sovereign C5ISRT systems integration capability connecting command, control, communications, sensors and training

evidence.snippet:
C5ISRT: The Backbone of Modern Defence
======================================
Integrated systems, trusted data and sovereign control—built and sustained by Calian.
Calian connects people, systems and data—bringing interoperability, resilience and readiness to modern military operations.

products.name: VCCI (Virtual Command and Control Integration)
products.descriptor: Virtual command and control data integration platform for defence exercises

evidence.snippet: Our data integration platforms, including Corolar and VCCI, enable seamless connectivity and interoperability across health and defence sectors. At Calian, we specialize in transforming fragmented data into cohesive insights that drive informed decision-making and unlock new insights.

products.name: MaestroEDE

evidence.snippet: *   MaestroEDE Copilot
#### AI-enabled process to develop content for large, complex military exercises

products.name: Calian SATCOM / Navigation Antennas
products.descriptor: Manufactured SATCOM and navigation antennas for positioning and communications

products.name: Calian ResponseReady™
products.descriptor: Industry-leading exercise management and simulation platform for emergency preparedness

evidence.snippet:
Calian ResponseReady™
---------------------
**Develop and deliver realistic emergency exercises**

Calian ResponseReady is the industry-leading exercise management and simulation platform that supports the creation, delivery and evaluation of highly realistic exercises that range from interoperability large-scale exercises, to small-scale organizational exercises and drills.

products.name: Bin-Sense®
products.descriptor: Agricultural grain bin sensor system monitoring coverage, temperature, and humidity

evidence.snippet: Calian developed a noise reduction application for a Calian agriculture product that monitors grain storage bins. Bin-Sense® uses sensors to detect the level of coverage, temperature and humidity in the bins and provides the information to farmers so that they can monitor their grain.

products.name: Calian® Corolar™
products.descriptor: Cloud-native healthcare interoperability platform for virtual care, remote patient monitoring and EHR integration

evidence.snippet:
Creating a connected care experience
====================================
Your comprehensive solution for streamlined patient care collaboration.
[Health solution overview (PDF)](https://sites.calian.com/app/uploads/sites/7/2024/10/Calian-Health-Virtual-Care-H240923BR.pdf)[Book a demo](#contact-form)
![](https://sites.calian.com/app/uploads/sites/7/2023/10/corololar-virtual-care@2x-1024x593.png)
Calian® Corolar™ suite
----------------------
Learn how our Corolar suite of products is being used by hospitals and health teams to provide a more connected experience for patients and providers.

--------------
Corolar, an award-winning Interoperability platform, deploys to your public cloud instance, offering advanced integration features, autonomy, control and data sovereignty for enhanced cloud-native efficiency. It simplifies creating, managing and monitoring seamless integration processes across multiple endpoints.

products.name: Corolar Virtual Care (CVC)
products.descriptor: Microsoft Teams-based virtual care solution for military and healthcare providers

evidence.snippet: *   Corolar Virtual Care (CVC)

Corolar Virtual Care (CVC) is a Microsoft Teams solution for healthcare providers to rapidly launch virtual services for military patients. Clinicians can easily access patient data for better collaboration with care teams and better outcomes for patients.

products.name: Virtual Command and Control Interface (VCCI)
products.descriptor: Sim-C2 interoperability middleware connecting military simulators to command-and-control applications

evidence.snippet:
Virtual Command and Control Interface (VCCI)
============================================
Best-in-class for Sim-C2 interoperability options

**Advanced interoperability solution for military training and analysis**
VCCI supports military users by mediating data between simulators and command-and-control applications.

products.name: MaestroEDE™
products.descriptor: Exercise design, development and delivery (E3D) software platform for large-scale military training exercises

evidence.snippet:
MaestroEDE™
===========
Seamlessly managing military training objectives through innovative E3D technology.

MaestroEDE is Calian’s innovative exercise design, development and delivery (E3D) software platform that delivers exceptional efficiency and flexibility for large-scale military exercises. Using one platform from concept to after-action review means that all activity is logical, traceable and data-driven. Its user-friendly interface allows new and experienced users to navigate easily through features and activities.

products.name: Aramis
products.descriptor: MOTS after-action review software graphically representing military simulation training data

evidence.snippet:
Elevating after-action reviews
#### Aramis
A game-changing MOTS solution for enhanced military training reviews, graphically representing complex simulation data.
](https://www.calian.com/defence/military-training-simulation/aramis/ "Aramis")

products.name: Calian VENTURES
products.descriptor: Defence innovation orchestrator connecting SMEs and government to scale sovereign C5ISRT capabilities

evidence.snippet:
### Calian VENTURES: Scaling sovereign capability
In today’s challenging defence environment, we must enable our own sovereignty to protect our future.

*   ##### **What is Calian VENTURES?**
    Calian VENTURES is Calian’s defence innovation orchestrator. It helps scale proven Canadian technologies into sovereign defence capabilities across C2 support systems, autonomous systems and space orchestration, all aligned with C5ISRT environments.

products.descriptor: Emergency exercise design, delivery and evaluation platform with immersive simulation tools

evidence.snippet:
Calian ResponseReady®
=====================

products.name: Bin-Sense Plus
products.descriptor: Wireless grain storage monitoring system with automatic aeration fan control and mobile/desktop dashboard

evidence.snippet: Bin-Sense® products

#### Bin-Sense Plus
    **Bin-Sense Plus** provides top-level grain storage monitoring with _automatic aeration fan control_ for optimized grain quality – delivering grain storage information right to your mobile or desktop device.](https://www.binsense.com/products/#bin-sense-plus "Bin-Sense Plus")

products.name: Bin-Sense Live
products.descriptor: Hourly wireless grain storage monitoring system with remote fan control via mobile or desktop

evidence.snippet:
#### Bin-Sense Live
    The **Bin-Sense Live** system delivers hourly grain storage information to your mobile or desktop device. It allows you to turn on your fans remotely, so you can relax knowing your grain temperature and moisture values are properly monitored.](https://www.binsense.com/products/#bin-sense-live "Bin-Sense Live")

products.name: Bin-Sense Solo
products.descriptor: Daily grain storage monitoring system for small to medium-sized bins with mobile/desktop reporting

products.name: Bin-Sense Direct
products.descriptor: On-site handheld grain monitoring reader connecting to bin cables via Bluetooth smartphone interface

evidence.snippet:
#### Bin-Sense Direct
    **Bin-Sense Direct** is an on-site handheld grain monitoring reader. Simply plug the reader into your bin cables and connect to your smartphone via Bluetooth, giving you a touch screen view of your stored grain.](https://www.binsense.com/products/#bin-sense-direct "Bin-Sense Direct")
